full_text:
Before Ziqi's summer vacation

- MIBI-TOF is in the Datacloud named "CyTOF_TNBC"

- The STELLAR dataset is also in Datacloud

- All the analysis notebooks are in
 > [[https://github.com/farkkilab/tribus/tree/data_test]{.underline}](https://github.com/farkkilab/tribus/tree/data_test)

Things we can do in the next several weeks:

- STELLAR almost finished

 - Ziqi: readme file for STELLAR dataset in Datacloud - DONE

 - upload code for pre-processing - All in the jupyter notebook

 - Astir on STELLAR

 - Correct the way to remove the outliers

- MIBI-TOF

 - If we can find a proper way for data pre-processing

- TMA

 - Checks the biology for the group of lymphoid cells corrected by
 > Tribus

 - Angela teaching Napari for Teo

- Pre & Post

 - Teo already got nice results!

 - Meeting with biologists (Teo)

Ziqi will be back July 16th
